title: Cluj-Napoca Hungarian Opera
summary:
The Cluj-Napoca Hungarian Opera (Hungarian: Kolozsvári Állami Magyar Opera; Romanian: Opera Maghiară din Cluj) is a public opera company in Cluj-Napoca, Romania, founded on 17 December 1948. It resides at the Hungarian Theatre of Cluj.
The structure was built during 1909–1910 on the site of an old summer theatre, and was reconstructed in 1959–1961. The ensemble can host up to 862 people.
text:
The Cluj-Napoca Hungarian Opera (Hungarian: Kolozsvári Állami Magyar Opera; Romanian: Opera Maghiară din Cluj) is a public opera company in Cluj-Napoca, Romania, founded on 17 December 1948. It resides at the Hungarian Theatre of Cluj.
The structure was built during 1909–1910 on the site of an old summer theatre, and was reconstructed in 1959–1961. The ensemble can host up to 862 people.
